## Summary

-

## Type of Change

- [ ] Add new paper or resource
- [ ] Update existing entry
- [ ] Fix link or metadata
- [ ] Improve documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] I placed the entry in the most relevant section.
- [ ] I used an arXiv abstract, official project page, or public repository link when available.
- [ ] I checked that this paper or resource is not already listed.
- [ ] I followed the existing README entry format.
- [ ] I verified the badge status for public resources.
